title: T-051 — Scanner production writes delegate to 08-production (canonical-owner fix)
prompt:
# T-051 — Scanner delegates wo_outputs/wo_waste_log writes to 08-production

## Goal
Retag T-042 (and audit T-039) so scanner endpoints CALL the 08-production service for any wo_outputs / wo_waste_log / wo_material_consumption write, never INSERT/UPDATE those tables directly. Closes BLOCKER B4 (canonical-owner HARD RULE violation): wo_outputs + wo_waste_log are owned by 08-production; scanner is only the UI trigger.

## Implementation contract
1. Rewrite T-042 implementation contract + ACs: output/co-product call the 08-production output service; waste calls the 08-production waste service. Scanner service only orchestrates (validate WO state, build payload, emit scanner audit) and delegates the canonical write.
2. Add a red-line to T-042 + T-039: do not INSERT/UPDATE wo_outputs / wo_waste_log / wo_material_consumption directly — delegate to 08-production via its cross-module contract.
3. Verify the 08-production task set EXPOSES the consumable services (output/co-product/waste/consume). If absent, raise a cross-module gap against 08.
4. Audit T-039 consume-to-WO: scanner owns only the 05-warehouse LP side (LP transition + stock_moves(consume_to_wo) + lp_genealogy(consume) + warehouse.material.consumed outbox, AFTER 09-quality T-064 consume gate); WO-side counter update is delegated, not owned.

## Acceptance criteria
- AC1 — Scanner output: the wo_outputs row is created by the 08-production service (single writer); scanner created only LP + genealogy + scanner_audit_log + outbox.
- AC2 — Scanner waste: wo_waste_log written by 08-production; no LP created; no direct scanner INSERT into wo_waste_log.
- AC3 — Consume-to-WO (T-039): warehouse owns LP transition/stock_moves/genealogy + warehouse.material.consumed (post T-064 gate); WO-side counter delegated, not owned by scanner.

pipeline_inputs.description: Retag scanner T-042 (and audit T-039) so wo_outputs/wo_waste_log/wo_material_consumption writes delegate to 08-production; scanner owns only LP + scanner_audit_log + outbox + LP-side of consume. Source: sidecar m06-T051 stub. Closes BLOCKER B4.

out_of_scope: Do not change unrelated task scope.

cross_module_dependencies.reason: 08-production owns wo_outputs/wo_waste_log writes; scanner must call its output/waste services (verify they are exposed; raise gap if absent).
warehouse.material.consumed outbox emitted ONLY after the 09-quality consume gate passes.

acceptance_criteria: Scanner output: wo_outputs created by 08-production service (single writer); scanner only created LP + genealogy + scanner_audit_log + outbox.
Scanner waste: wo_waste_log written by 08-production; no direct scanner INSERT.
Consume-to-WO: warehouse owns LP side post-T-064 gate; WO-side counter delegated.
test_strategy: RED-first per the implementation contract; capture actual test output.
risk_red_lines: Scanner must NOT own any wo_* canonical table write.
material.consumed outbox emitted ONLY after 09-quality T-064 consume gate passes.
